name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_copywriting
prompts.template: Create SEO-optimized marketing copy for the following product description: {content_data}. Focus on keywords: {keywords}.
prompts.use_case: Improving website landing page conversion rates using AI-generated copy and SEO optimization.

prompts.name: cro_analysis
prompts.template: Analyze the following webpage data for conversion rate optimization opportunities: {analytics_data}. Provide actionable recommendations.
prompts.use_case: Generating high-quality marketing copy for digital campaigns.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_generator
prompts.template: Based on this growth metrics data: {growth_metrics}, suggest innovative growth engineering strategies.
prompts.use_case: Analyzing web traffic and campaign data to extract actionable marketing insights.

prompts.name: performance_insights_report
prompts.template: Generate a summary report of marketing performance insights from this data: {analytics_data}.
prompts.use_case: Engineering growth strategies for startups or digital products using data-driven approaches.
